name: ruby-simple-oauth

description:
Simply builds and verifies OAuth headers
The library, "simple_oauth", provides classes in order to simply build
and verify OAuth headers.

When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair ruby-simple-oauth with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `ruby-simple-oauth --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
